caption: A man with a distinct, tall, grey vertical hairstyle wearing black glasses, over-ear headphones, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders speaks into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room with walls decorated with framed photographs and clothing displays, including a "LEE" brand garment. A logo and text appearing on the left and right sides of the screen read "TALK JOY PODCAST" and "TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man continues speaking, with his facial expression shifting slightly and his head tilting slightly downward. The background remains static throughout the clip, while the man's mouth moves and his gaze shifts, indicating an active conversation or recording session in a studio or retail-inspired setting.
